apod_title: NGC 300: A Cosmic Gemstone with Stars and Gas Clouds
label: namecode - SUPERNOVA | 6 ly
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by NGC 300: A Cosmic Gemstone with Stars and Gas Clouds. This sparkling, colorful gemstone is a spiral galaxy, NGC 300.   It is one of the closest spiral galaxies to Earth, only about 6 million light-years away.     But does it really look like this?   Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
